message:
fix(freeze): use atom-based property access for string keys in array opcodes

- Add JS_SetProperty extern binding for atom-based property assignment
- Fix put_array_el to use JS_ValueToAtom + JS_SetProperty + JS_FreeAtom
  instead of toInt32 + setPropertyUint32 (which converted strings to 0)
- Fix define_array_el with same atom-based approach
- Fix get_array_el/get_array_el2 to use getPropertyValue which handles
  both integer and string keys correctly
- Fix opcode_emitter.zig with same fixes for relooper codegen path
- Also includes: typeof fix, push_const fix, Array.push vstack sync,
  average pattern optimization, JS_ToObject extern

This fixes for-in loops with dynamic property access at global scope.
Note: Complex expressions like target[key] = source[key] inside for-in
loops with function arguments still have stack management issues to fix.
